task.title: Implement SQLite storage adapter for local development

events.content: Defined shared server storage interfaces under packages/server/src/storage: Defined shared server storage interfaces under packages/server/src/storage

raw.question: Defined shared server storage interfaces under packages/server/src/storage
raw.chosen: Defined shared server storage interfaces under packages/server/src/storage
raw.reasoning: Routes and engine modules need a single backend-agnostic contract before swapping D1, KV, and Durable Object access behind adapters such as SQLite for local development.

events.content: Storage contract layer is now defined for identities, revocation, roles, policies, audit logs, and audit webhooks. This narrows the adapter work to concrete implementations behind the new interface boundary.

Introduce a dedicated storage interface module and expose the SQLite adapter via package subpath exports: Introduce a dedicated storage interface module and expose the SQLite adapter via package subpath exports

raw.question: Introduce a dedicated storage interface module and expose the SQLite adapter via package subpath exports
raw.chosen: Introduce a dedicated storage interface module and expose the SQLite adapter via package subpath exports
raw.reasoning: The adapter depends on types that do not exist in the current server package, and subpath exports keep node-oriented storage code available for local development without forcing it through the default worker entrypoint.

events.content: Added a Cloudflare storage adapter layer and patched the new storage interface to match existing DO and audit webhook payloads: Added a Cloudflare storage adapter layer and patched the new storage interface to match existing DO and audit webhook payloads

raw.question: Added a Cloudflare storage adapter layer and patched the new storage interface to match existing DO and audit webhook payloads
raw.chosen: Added a Cloudflare storage adapter layer and patched the new storage interface to match existing DO and audit webhook payloads
raw.reasoning: The current Durable Object and webhook flows require fields that were missing from the untracked interface draft, so the adapter surface had to reflect existing persistence payloads rather than inventing translation logic.

retrospective.summary: Implemented the Cloudflare storage adapter module and aligned webhook event normalization with the current storage interface draft
